channel.title: Solved Flutter exercises (step by step) :: Flutter en rigle.dev
channel.description: Solved Flutter exercises to practice state, widgets, forms, navigation, API calls, local persistence, and testing with practical examples.

item.title: Flutter + AI: 5 practical ideas to build useful apps
item.description: Practical ideas to combine Flutter and AI in real products: smart forms, semantic search, and contextual assistants.

item.title: Flutter Android, Web, or Windows: practical comparison to choose your platform
item.description: Practical guide to choose between Flutter Android, Web, and Windows based on product type, delivery speed, and user experience.

item.title: Dark Mode in Flutter with ThemeMode: solved exercise
item.description: Solved Flutter dark mode exercise with ThemeMode to switch between light and dark themes cleanly.

item.title: Flutter Widget Test: solved UI testing exercise
item.description: Solved Flutter widget testing exercise with flutter_test to validate UI interactions and reduce regressions.

item.title: Riverpod in Flutter: solved counter exercise
item.description: Solved Riverpod Flutter exercise using StateProvider to manage counter state in a simple, scalable way.

item.title: go_router in Flutter: solved navigation exercise
item.description: Solved go_router Flutter exercise with declarative routes, named navigation, and path parameters.

item.title: SQLite with sqflite in Flutter: solved CRUD exercise
item.description: Solved SQLite Flutter exercise with sqflite to implement a local tasks CRUD with persistent storage.

item.title: SharedPreferences in Flutter: solved exercise for local settings
item.description: Solved SharedPreferences Flutter exercise to persist simple local app settings like username or theme choice.

item.title: Firebase Auth Login in Flutter: solved email/password exercise
item.description: Solved Firebase Auth Flutter login exercise using email/password with basic authentication error handling.

item.title: Infinite Scroll in Flutter: solved pagination exercise
item.description: Solved Flutter infinite scroll exercise with batch pagination, ScrollController, and incremental load control.

item.title: FutureBuilder in Flutter: solved exercise for loading states
item.description: Learn FutureBuilder in Flutter with a solved exercise handling loading, error, and data states clearly.

item.title: Flutter API Call with http: solved REST exercise
item.description: Solved Flutter API exercise using the http package, JSON parsing, and safe rendering for remote data.

item.title: Provider in Flutter for global state: solved exercise
item.description: Solved Provider Flutter exercise with ChangeNotifier to manage shared state cleanly across widgets.

item.title: BottomNavigationBar in Flutter: solved exercise with IndexedStack
item.description: Solved BottomNavigationBar Flutter exercise using IndexedStack to preserve tab state between sections.

item.title: Named Routes in Flutter: solved navigation exercise
item.description: Solved Flutter navigation exercise using named routes to move between screens with a clean and maintainable route map.

item.title: Flutter Form Validation: solved exercise with TextFormField
item.description: Build a validated Flutter form with a solved exercise covering field rules, error messages, and safe submit flow.

item.title: ListView.builder in Flutter: solved exercise with dynamic list
item.description: Solved ListView.builder Flutter exercise to render long dynamic lists efficiently with reusable item widgets.

item.title: Flutter Counter with setState: solved exercise step by step
item.description: Learn how to build a Flutter counter with setState in a solved exercise to understand local state and widget rebuilds.
